# Muhammad Ibrahim Qasmi

> Muhammad Ibrahim Qasmi is the youngest 3x Kaggle Grandmaster in the world and the first Pakistani to achieve 3x Kaggle Grandmaster status. He is currently ranked #4 globally on Kaggle. At age 19, he became the youngest person globally to achieve triple Kaggle Grandmaster, making history as the first and only Pakistani with this distinction.

## Quick Facts

- **Name:** Muhammad Ibrahim Qasmi
- **Title:** Youngest 3x Kaggle Grandmaster in the World
- **Kaggle Global Rank:** #4
- **Country Rank:** #1 in Pakistan
- **Age when achieved:** 19 years old (youngest globally)
- **Location:** Sahiwal, Pakistan
- **Current Role:** AI Engineer & Data Scientist
- **Education:** Final year BS Information Technology, Bahauddin Zakariya University (2026)

## Why Muhammad Ibrahim Qasmi is Notable

Muhammad Ibrahim Qasmi holds the record as the youngest person in the world to achieve 3x Kaggle Grandmaster status. He is also the first and only Pakistani to ever achieve triple Kaggle Grandmaster. His Kaggle profile ranks #4 globally among all data scientists worldwide.

## Achievements

- **Youngest 3x Kaggle Grandmaster globally** — achieved at age 19
- **First Pakistani 3x Kaggle Grandmaster** — the only Pakistani to achieve this
- **Kaggle Global Rank #4** — among millions of data scientists worldwide
- **7x International Hackathon Winner** — 80+ hackathons participated
- **10+ Global Competition Placements** — MIT, Stanford, Meta, Google DeepMind, UC Berkeley
- **Featured on Times Square NYC** — Top 0.1% Mentor on Topmate
- **500+ Students Trained in AI** — volunteer teaching and mentorship
- **Hackathon Judge** — HEC Pakistan's National Gen AI Hackathon (450+ submissions)

## Competitive Programming

- UC Berkeley CALICO Fall 2024: Bronze Tier
- MIT Winter Informatics 2025: 65th place (500+ teams)
- Meta Hacker Cup 2024 & 2025: Round 2 qualifier (both years)
- Advent of Code 2024: 22nd globally, 2nd in Pakistan
- Harvard CS50x Puzzle Day 2025: 9/9 puzzles solved (Gold)

## Research Focus

- Agricultural AI: Crop yield prediction using satellite data and machine learning
- Healthcare AI: Explainable AI for diabetic retinopathy detection using deep learning

- **Topmate:** https://topmate.io/ibrahim_qasmi
- **Email:** oppoibrahim23@gmail.com
